title: Coding agent harness written in native Golang with built-in file and Git viewer
abstract: Coding agent harness written in native Golang with built-in file and Git viewer is an AI agent framework that autonomously plans tasks, calls tools, and executes multi-step workflows. Set the goal,...
abstract_zh: coding小助手，原生 Golang 编写，自带文件和 Git 观察眼，自动规划任务、调用工具，执行多步骤 workflow。你说“我要搞事情”，它就默默给你安排好一切，就像身边有个编程界的谋士，但不收智商税！设置目标，让它去操作吧，保证你代码人生从此开挂！
